message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

package "diagram" {
    package "visitor" {
        interface IDiagramVisitor {
            +visit(ClassDiagram visitor) : void
            +visit(SequenceDiagram visitor) : void
            +visit(UseCaseDiagram visitor) : void
            +visit(DiagramManager visitor) : void
        }
        class ToViewVisitor {
            +getDiagramMenu() : IDiagramMenu
            +getDiagramEditor() : IDiagramEditor
        }
    }
}

class UmlReverseApp
class MainController
interface IDiagramMenu
interface IDiagramEditor

package "javafx" {
    class Stage
    class Scene
    class BorderPane
    class MenuBar
    class MenuItem
    class TabPane
    class TreeFileManagerView
}

UmlReverseApp o-- MainController : controller
UmlReverseApp o-- Stage : stage
Stage o-- Scene : scene
Scene o-- BorderPane : borderpane
BorderPane o-- MenuBar : north
MenuBar o-- MenuItem : items
BorderPane o-- TabPane : center
TabPane o-- IDiagramEditor : editors
BorderPane o-- TreeFileManagerView : fileManagerView
BorderPane o-- IDiagramMenu : est
ToViewVisitor ..|> IDiagramVisitor
IDiagramVisitor <|.. UmlReverseApp

@enduml
```
